query:
SELECT 
  f.corretorId,
  u.name as corretorNome,
  u.email as corretorEmail,
  COUNT(*) as total_followups
FROM follow_ups f
INNER JOIN users u ON f.corretorId = u.id
WHERE f.status = 'pendente'
  AND DATE(f.dataFollowUp) = CURDATE()
GROUP BY f.corretorId, u.name, u.email;
